title: InventorySorter
description: This mod adds a item that can sort you inventory after a selfmade preset.
body:
Advanced Inventory Sorter

This mod adds a fully configurable Inventory Sorter item that allows you to organize your inventory exactly the way you want.

Instead of relying on automatic sorting rules, you define your own layout and apply it instantly whenever needed.

Editing Your Preset

To configure your sorter:

Sneak + Right Click while holding the sorter item

A virtual inventory screen will open

On one side, you will see an item selection panel

Double-click an item to add it to your preset

Drag it into the slot where you want it to appear

Press ESC when you are finished

Your layout is saved automatically.

Using Your Preset

To apply your saved layout:

Double-click the sorter item

Your inventory will immediately rearrange according to your preset

The sorting is fast, consistent, and fully based on your configuration.

Features

Fully customizable inventory layouts

Visual configuration interface

No commands required

Survival-friendly

Lightweight and optimized
